feed.title: runetsout
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from runetsout

entry.title: Do you know any other activites like that I should try? #switzerland #immigrant #zurich #swisstiktoker #swissalps #paragliding #flyzermatt

entry.title: Yeah, people here drive to Germany to buy groceries 😅 #switzerland #swisslife #swisslifestyle #germany

entry.title: I guess that why swiss medicine os so good, its just too expensive to die #switzerland #swisslife #swisslifestyle

entry.title: Eat as much as you want, but make sure to cover the price of the ticket #lindtmuseum #lindtchocolate #lindtchocolatefactory #swisschocolate #switzerland
